SearXNG bundled runtime
Upstream: https://github.com/searxng/searxng
Revision: 62a1ab7eddc84e98e97605e0a1378e806de6185c
License: AGPL-3.0-or-later (see LICENSE in this directory)

Only the upstream searx Python package and corresponding documentation/license
are included. Linux deployment scripts and development-only files are omitted
because they cannot be used by the Windows desktop sidecar.

Local compatibility patch: searx/valkeydb.py treats the Unix-only pwd module as
optional. The bundled private instance disables Valkey and the public limiter.
